## Return Value

A new JavaScript context.

## Discussion

This initializer creates a context along with a new, independent virtual machine (a [doc://com.apple.javascriptcore/documentation/JavaScriptCore/JSVirtualMachine] object). You cannot pass JavaScript values ([doc://com.apple.javascriptcore/documentation/JavaScriptCore/JSValue] objects) between contexts in different virtual machines. To create contexts that share a virtual machine, use the [doc://com.apple.javascriptcore/documentation/JavaScriptCore/JSContext/init(virtualMachine:)] initializer.

# init()

**Initializer**

Initializes a new JavaScript context.

## Declaration

```swift
init!()
```

## Return Value

A new JavaScript context.

## Discussion

This initializer creates a context along with a new, independent virtual machine (a [doc://com.apple.javascriptcore/documentation/JavaScriptCore/JSVirtualMachine] object). You cannot pass JavaScript values ([doc://com.apple.javascriptcore/documentation/JavaScriptCore/JSValue] objects) between contexts in different virtual machines. To create contexts that share a virtual machine, use the [doc://com.apple.javascriptcore/documentation/JavaScriptCore/JSContext/init(virtualMachine:)] initializer.

## Creating JavaScript contexts

- **init(virtualMachine:)**: Creates a new JavaScript context associated with a specific virtual machine.
